title: Login field autofilled with stale browser-cached credentials then silently overwritten — stale session submitted
description: Simulates a user whose browser autofills an old email/password pair into the login form (e.g. from a previous account), the user types only in the username field thinking they are logging in as themselves, then submits. The password field retains the autofilled stale value. This tests whether the form correctly binds the live DOM values at submit time rather than React/Vue state that may not reflect autofilled content.
expected_result: PASS: The server rejects the mismatched credentials and returns an error; no session is created. FAIL: The application logs the user into AccountB using AccountA's cached password (if the passwords happen to match across accounts), OR the framework's state management layer uses a stale password value that bypasses the actual DOM field value — both represent authentication logic bugs.

test_steps.expected: Login page renders with empty email and password fields

test_steps.action: Click into the email field to trigger browser autofill for AccountA
test_steps.expected: Browser autofill populates email with 'margaret.chen@oldcompany.org' and password with AccountA's saved password

test_steps.action: Clear the email field and type the intended (AccountB) email address — do NOT touch the password field
test_steps.expected: Email field now shows 'margaret.chen@newcompany.io'; password field still contains the autofilled stale value from AccountA

test_steps.action: Submit the form without modifying the autofilled password
test_steps.expected: Form is submitted with email=AccountB and password=AccountA (mismatched credentials)

test_steps.action: Verify the application returns an authentication failure rather than unexpectedly authenticating
test_steps.expected: An authentication error message is displayed (e.g. 'Incorrect email or password'); the user is NOT redirected to a dashboard

test_steps.action: Verify the URL has not changed to an authenticated route
test_steps.expected: URL remains on /login and no authenticated session cookie is set
